method6d.title: 6D Navigation System
method6d.subtitle: Six Vectors of Health
method6d.description: Individual recovery roadmap for each patient.

1.quote: Twelve doctors in eight years. Each one treated a piece. None saw the pattern. Dr. Erkin found HPA-axis exhaustion in the first session.

2.quote: Antidepressants stopped working. The 6D assessment revealed what no one checked — cellular energy collapse. Three months later, I'm running my company again.

3.quote: Rheumatologist — nothing. Neurologist — nothing. Dr. Erkin connected dots no one else saw. Finally, a diagnosis that makes sense.

4.quote: Brain fog, fatigue, palpitations — doctors told me to wait. The 6D protocol addressed autonomic dysfunction directly. I got my brain back.

5.quote: I spent €40,000 on treatments that didn't work. €100 diagnostic showed what everyone missed: it was neuroinflammation.

6.quote: TSH perfect. Couldn't get out of bed. Dr. Erkin explained T4-to-T3 conversion at cellular level. Now I understand my body.

7.quote: Six years of diets and pills. Dr. Erkin found the gut-brain connection no one was looking for. Four months later, I eat normally.

8.quote: MRI clear, pills don't help. 6D analysis revealed cervical dysfunction and dietary triggers. Finally living without fear.

items.title: Chronic Fatigue

items.title: 6D Diagnostics
items.description: Deep systemic analysis of your health state (60 minutes).

items.title: Mentorship
items.description: Regular sessions to adjust and refine the recovery process.

items.question: Why are my lab results 'normal' if I feel unwell?
items.answer: Standard tests look for acute pathologies. We focus on functional imbalances and seek the underlying logic behind your symptoms.

items.question: How does an online consultation work?
items.answer: The session lasts 60 minutes via Zoom. We create a navigational map for your recovery process.

items.question: What is 6D Navigation?
items.answer: It is a comprehensive approach analyzing six health vectors: Diagnostics, Dysfunction, Regulation, Direction, Development, and Depth.

items.question: Who is 6D Diagnostics for?
items.answer: For patients with chronic issues where standard medicine has failed to identify the root cause.

items.question: How much does a consultation cost?
items.answer: The primary 6D Diagnostics session costs €100 for 60 minutes.

items.question: How do I book an appointment?
items.answer: Fill out the form on this page or contact us via WhatsApp.

items.question: Do you offer in-person consultations?
items.answer: Yes, in-person consultations are available in Piešťany by prior appointment.
